steps.title: Convert percentages to decimal equations
steps.content:
Convert 567% to 5.67 and 0.945% to 0.00945 by dividing each by 100. This gives:
  • $A = 5.67B$ (since A is 567% of B)
  • $A = 0.00945C$ (since A is 0.945% of C)

steps.title: Equate the two expressions for A and solve for C
steps.content:
Since both expressions equal $A$:
$$5.67B = 0.00945C$$
Divide both sides by 0.00945:
$$C = \frac{5.67}{0.00945} \cdot B$$

steps.title: Calculate the ratio and convert to a percentage
steps.content:
Simplify $\frac{5.67}{0.00945}$:
$$\frac{5.67}{0.00945} = \frac{5670}{9.45} = \frac{567000}{945} = 600$$
So $C = 600B$, which means $C$ is 600 times $B$. Expressed as a percentage: $C = 60000\%$ of $B$. Therefore $p = 60000$.
